headline: Paramount Gets Warner Bros. Discovery, but Netflix Comes Out a Winner
summary: Paramount has won the bidding war for Warner Bros. Discovery, but it was Netflix stock that soared on the news.

raw.headline: Paramount Gets Warner Bros. Discovery, but Netflix Comes Out a Winner

headline: Pentagon Turns to Ex-Uber Executive in Anthropic Feud Over AI
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. — as it wrangled with governments in pursuit of market domination.  Now, Michael has switched sides in a battle involving a different startup — this time taking a leading role in the Pentagon’s dispute with artificial intelligence pioneer Anthropic PBC.  As US Under Secretary of Defense for Research and Engineering, Michael has been negotiating with Anthropic and its chief executive officer, Dario Amodei, over how the defense department can use its AI models.

headline: How a Former EMT Just Sank a Bunch of Stocks on AI Fears
summary: A disguised bear report went viral and surprisingly sank stocks in a jittery market.

headline: Uber Air Taxis In Dubai Test Multi Modal Platform Ambitions
summary: Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) is partnering with Joby Aviation to introduce an all electric air taxi service in Dubai. The service is planned to be integrated directly into the Uber app, allowing riders to book air and ground transport in one place. Dubai is set to be the launch city, with intentions for a broader global rollout over time. For Uber, best known for its ride hailing and delivery services, this move expands its role in how people get around cities. Urban air mobility has...
